allow: Bash(node -e "const m = require\('@link.money/linkmoney-web'\); console.log\('keys:', Object.keys\(m\)\); console.log\('default:', typeof m.default\); console.log\('LinkMoney:', typeof m.LinkMoney\); console.log\('type of m:', typeof m\)")

Bash(node -e "const M = require\('@link.money/linkmoney-web'\).default; const inst = new M\({ sessionUrl: 'test', environment: 'sandbox', sessionVersion: 2 }\); console.log\('instance keys:', Object.keys\(inst\)\); console.log\('prototype:', Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(inst\)\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const M = require\('@link.money/linkmoney-web'\).default; const src = M.toString\(\); console.log\(src.substring\(0, 2000\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const M = require\('@link.money/linkmoney-web'\).default; const src = M.toString\(\); const methods = src.match\(/\\b\\w+\\s*\\\(/g\); console.log\([...new Set\(methods\)].join\('\\n'\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const M = require\('@link.money/linkmoney-web'\).default; const src = M.toString\(\); const idx = src.indexOf\('callSessionUrl'\); console.log\(src.substring\(idx-200, idx+500\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const M = require\('@link.money/linkmoney-web'\).default; const src = M.toString\(\); const idx = src.indexOf\('callSessionUrl'\); const chunk = src.substring\(idx, idx+800\); console.log\(chunk\)")

Bash(node -e "const M = require\('@link.money/linkmoney-web'\).default; const src = M.toString\(\); const idx = src.indexOf\('callSessionUrl\(e\){'\); if\(idx===-1\){const idx2=src.indexOf\('callSessionUrl'\); console.log\(src.substring\(idx2, idx2+20\)\)} else { console.log\(src.substring\(idx, idx+500\)\) }")
